# Vectorized sequence parsing

## Features of the benchmarked CPUs

:::{#tbl-cpus .large-table}
| CPU | Year | SSE | AVX2 | BMI2 | NEON |
|:----|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
| **Intel** | | | | | |
| Xeon X5670             | 2010 | + | -- | -- | -- |
| Xeon E5-2620           | 2012 | + | -- | -- | -- |
| Xeon E7-4850 V3        | 2015 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon E5-2620 V4        | 2016 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 6130         | 2017 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 5218         | 2019 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 5318Y        | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Silver 4314       | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 6442Y        | 2023 | + | + | + | -- |
| Core Ultra 7 165H \*[^pc]   | 2023 | + | + | + | -- |
| **AMD** | | | | | |
| Epyc 7301                | 2017 | + | + | ~[^pdep] | -- |
| Epyc 7452                | 2019 | + | + | ~ | -- |
| Epyc 7642                | 2019 | + | + | ~ | -- |
| Epyc 7513                | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Epyc 9254                | 2022 | + | + | + | -- |
| Ryzen 5 8500G \*         | 2024 | + | + | + | -- |
| **ARM** | | | | | |
| Apple M1 \*              | 2020 | -- | -- | -- | + |
| Apple M3 Pro \*          | 2023 | -- | -- | -- | + |
| Neoverse-V2              | 2023 | -- | -- | -- | + |

Instruction-set extensions supported by the benchmarked CPUs.
:::

[^pc]: (\*) personal computers, not benchmarked in a reproducible environment
[^pdep]: (~) microcoded PDEP/PEXT instructions (very slow)

## Additional experiments on data read from disk

:::{#fig-throughput-long-reads layout-ncol=2}
![](../fig/parsing/parser_throughput_mmap_m54328_180928_230446_Q20_fq)

Throughput of each parser for long reads on multiple CPUs, sorted by manufacturer and year.
:::

## Additional experiments on data loaded in RAM

### Throughput

:::{#fig-throughput-ram layout-ncol=2}

![On short reads (FASTQ format).](../fig/parsing/parser_throughput_reader_D1_S1_L001_R2_007_fq){#fig-throughput-short-reads-ram}

![On long reads (FASTQ format).](../fig/parsing/parser_throughput_reader_m54328_180928_230446_Q20_fq){#fig-throughput-long-reads-ram}

Throughput of each parser for data loaded in RAM on multiple CPUs, sorted by manufacturer and year. Needletail and Paraseq both have to use a reader over a slice,
which degrades their performance.
:::

:::{#fig-throughput-count layout-ncol=2}
![](../fig/parsing/count_throughput_reader_chm13v2_0_fa)

Throughput of Helicase string collection compared to counting DNA bases.
:::

### Instructions and cycles

:::{#fig-instructions-and-cycles-short-reads layout-ncol=2}

![Instructions per byte on short reads.](../fig/parsing/parser_instructions_reader_D1_S1_L001_R2_007_fq){#fig-instructions-short-reads}

![Cycles per byte on short reads.](../fig/parsing/parser_cycles_reader_D1_S1_L001_R2_007_fq){#fig-cycles-short-reads}

Instructions and cycles per byte on multiple CPUs, sorted by manufacturer and year.
:::

### Branches and branch misses

:::{#fig-branches layout-ncol=2}

![On a human genome (FASTA format).](../fig/parsing/parser_branches_reader_chm13v2_0_fa){#fig-branches-genome}

![On short reads (FASTQ format).](../fig/parsing/parser_branches_reader_D1_S1_L001_R2_007_fq){#fig-branches-short-reads}

Branches per byte on multiple CPUs, sorted by manufacturer and year.
:::

:::{#fig-branch-misses layout-ncol=2}

![On a human genome (FASTA format).](../fig/parsing/parser_branch_misses_reader_chm13v2_0_fa){#fig-branch-misses-genome}

![On short reads (FASTQ format).](../fig/parsing/parser_branch_misses_reader_D1_S1_L001_R2_007_fq){#fig-branch-misses-short-reads}

Branch misses per MB on multiple CPUs, sorted by manufacturer and year.
:::
